waitlist.welcome:
Welcome! You've been added to our waitlist.

An administrator will review your request and approve your account shortly. We'll send you a message when you're approved.

In the meantime, if you'd like to provide a name for your shop, just send another message with it.
waitlist.shop_name_noted:
Thanks! We've noted your shop name as "{shop_name}".

You're still on our waitlist. An administrator will review your request soon.
waitlist.still_pending:
Thanks for your message! You're still on our waitlist.

An administrator will review your request soon. We'll notify you when your account is approved.
waitlist.rejected: Sorry, your request to join was not approved. Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
waitlist.already_processed: Waitlist entry already processed or not found

approval.welcome:
Welcome to Auto Tuck Shop! Your account has been approved.

Company: {company}

You can now send sales messages to track your sales. For example:
'sold 2 cokes R15 each, 1 chips R10'
'3 waters R12 each, 2 chocolates R8 each'

As an owner, you can also add assistants by sending messages like:
'add assistant +27821234567'

audio.download_failed: Sorry, I couldn't download your audio message. Please try sending it again or send a text message instead.
audio.transcription_failed: Sorry, I couldn't transcribe your audio message. Please try sending a text message instead.

assistant.not_owner: Sorry, only shop owners can add assistants. Contact the shop owner if you need to add team members.
assistant.missing_phone: I couldn't find a phone number. Please resend the full message, e.g., 'add assistant +27821234567'
assistant.already_registered: The phone number {phone} is already registered to another user.

sale.no_products: I couldn't identify any products. Please send a full sale message, e.g., "sold 2 cokes R15 each, 1 chips R10"
sale.missing_prices_note: Note: Some items have no price set. Press "Start Over" and resend everything with prices included (e.g. "2x Pear @ R5").
sale.cancelled: ✗ This sale has been thrown out. Send everything again to redo it.
sale.already_processed: Sale already processed or not found
